hero.title: About
hero.desc: On-chain analysis and legal collaboration experts. Emergency freeze response in as fast as 5 minutes, with customized digital asset recovery solutions.

company.title: Company Profile
company.p1: USDTRecovery is a comprehensive service provider focused on digital asset security and recovery. We integrate professional resources across blockchain technology, cybersecurity, and legal compliance to provide efficient and reliable asset protection solutions globally.
company.p2: Since our establishment in 2021, we have adhered to the service philosophy of 'Professional, Efficient, Confidential,' successfully helping hundreds of clients recover digital asset losses. Our services cover 150+ major blockchains including BTC, ETH, and USDT, with judicial partnerships with 500+ global exchanges and wallets.
company.p3: Whether you're an individual user facing phishing attacks or an institution dealing with complex DeFi security incidents, we provide full-cycle services from on-chain analysis and evidence preservation to legal collaboration.

teamSection.title: Professional Team
teamSection.p1: Leave professional matters to professional teams. We integrate Crypto industry resources and expertise with craftsmanship to save time and provide targeted solutions.
teamSection.p2: Bringing together the industry's most experienced on-chain analysts, legal experts, and lawyers, as the only comprehensive solution provider, we focus on solving the toughest problems. Whether your assets were stolen from complex DeFi protocols or through sophisticated phishing attacks, we provide professional analysis and recovery solutions.

sections.title: 2. Information Usage
sections.content: We use your information only for:

sections.title: 3. Information Protection
sections.content: We use industry-standard encryption to protect your information. All case information is strictly confidential and will not be disclosed to third parties without your consent.

sections.title: 4. Contact Us
sections.content: For privacy-related questions, please contact us via Telegram.

sections.title: 2. Success Rate Disclaimer
sections.content: Success rates and case data shown are based on historical case statistics and do not constitute a guarantee for your case. Each case has different circumstances, and recovery results may vary.

sections.title: 3. Fee Structure
sections.content: Service fees are determined based on case complexity. Some services use a 'success fee' model; specific terms will be specified in the service agreement.

sections.title: 4. Liability Limitation
sections.content: We strive to provide professional services but do not guarantee successful asset recovery for all cases. Clients should understand the challenges posed by blockchain asset anonymity and irreversibility.

sections.title: 5. Contact Us
sections.content: For any questions, please contact us via Telegram.
